title: lemna gibba
intro: Lemna gibba, also known as lesser duckweed, is a small floating aquatic plant that belongs to the family Lemnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lemna gibba are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used as a food ingredient in some cultures, particularly in Asia, where it is considered a delicacy.
